locations.label: Camp Foster (MCAS)
locations.note: Main Marine Corps hub. Commissary, hospital, PX, legal office.

locations.label: Kadena Air Base
locations.note: Largest US Air Force base in Asia. Main gate off Route 58.

locations.label: Camp Kinser
locations.note: Marine Corps logistics base. Housing and support facilities.

locations.label: Camp Courtney
locations.note: III MEF headquarters. Northern housing area.

locations.label: Camp Hansen
locations.note: Marine training base in central Okinawa.

locations.label: Camp Schwab
locations.note: Northern training base near Nago.

locations.label: Torii Station
locations.note: Army installation. Yomitan area.

locations.label: Naval Hospital Okinawa
locations.note: Main US military hospital. Camp Foster Building 2966.

locations.label: Okinawa Prefectural Nanbu Medical Center
locations.note: Largest Japanese hospital in southern Okinawa.

locations.label: Chubu Tokushukai Hospital
locations.note: Central Okinawa. Closest major hospital for Okinawa City and Uruma families.

locations.label: Kadena Commissary
locations.note: Main on-base grocery store.

locations.label: Costco Japan (Chatan)
locations.note: Membership warehouse. US brands and bulk quantities.

locations.label: Don Quijote Chatan
locations.note: 24-hour discount store. Popular with military families.

locations.label: San-A Urasoe Main
locations.note: Large San-A supermarket. Good for everyday Japanese grocery shopping.

locations.label: Makishi Public Market (Naha)
locations.note: Iconic local market. Fresh fish, produce, local specialties.

locations.label: Shuri Castle (首里城)
locations.note: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Historic Ryukyuan castle in Naha.

locations.label: Churaumi Aquarium
locations.note: World-class aquarium in northern Okinawa. Great for families with kids.

locations.label: American Village (Chatan)
locations.note: Shopping, restaurants, and entertainment. Very popular with military families.

locations.label: Cape Manzamo
locations.note: Stunning coastal cliffs. One of Okinawa's most iconic viewpoints.

locations.label: Kokusai Street (国際通り)
locations.note: Naha's main shopping and dining street. Great for souvenirs and local food.

locations.label: Katsuren Castle Ruins
locations.note: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Ancient Ryukyuan castle near Uruma.

locations.label: Emerald Beach
locations.note: Free public beach near Churaumi Aquarium. Calm water, great for families.
